'''鈭歱-dh-z''' ('''padhaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flatbed|flatbed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flatbed|flatbed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-dh-z
|-
! Lemma
| padhaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhazithi|padhazithi]] || [[word:padhaziji|padhaziji]] || [[word:padhazishi|padhazishi]] || [[word:padhazi|padhazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhazuthuth|padhazuthuth]] || [[word:padhazujuj|padhazujuj]] || [[word:padhazushush|padhazushush]] || [[word:padhaz|padhaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhazuthu|padhazuthu]] || [[word:padhazuju|padhazuju]] || [[word:padhazushu|padhazushu]] || [[word:padhazu|padhazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhazufuth|padhazufuth]] || [[word:padhazufuj|padhazufuj]] || [[word:padhazufush|padhazufush]] || [[word:padhazuf|padhazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhazethe|padhazethe]] || [[word:padhazeje|padhazeje]] || [[word:padhazeshe|padhazeshe]] || [[word:padhaze|padhaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhazothoth|padhazothoth]] || [[word:padhazojoj|padhazojoj]] || [[word:padhazoshosh|padhazoshosh]] || [[word:padhaz|padhaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhazotho|padhazotho]] || [[word:padhazojo|padhazojo]] || [[word:padhazosho|padhazosho]] || [[word:padhazo|padhazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhazofoth|padhazofoth]] || [[word:padhazofoj|padhazofoj]] || [[word:padhazofosh|padhazofosh]] || [[word:padhazof|padhazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhaz忙th忙|padhaz忙th忙]] || [[word:padhaz忙j忙|padhaz忙j忙]] || [[word:padhaz忙sh忙|padhaz忙sh忙]] || [[word:padhaz忙|padhaz忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhazathath|padhazathath]] || [[word:padhazajaj|padhazajaj]] || [[word:padhazashash|padhazashash]] || [[word:padhaz|padhaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhazatha|padhazatha]] || [[word:padhazaja|padhazaja]] || [[word:padhazasha|padhazasha]] || [[word:padhaza|padhaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhazafath|padhazafath]] || [[word:padhazafaj|padhazafaj]] || [[word:padhazafash|padhazafash]] || [[word:padhazaf|padhazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:padhazasha|padhazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopadhazasha|gopadhazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipadhazasha|gokipadhazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:padhazn眉sha|padhazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopadhaznkn眉sha|gopadhaznkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhazn眉sha|gokipadhazn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:padhazsh毛sha|padhazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopadhaznksh毛sha|gopadhaznksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipadhazsh毛sha|gokipadhazsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhazrosha|padhazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhaznkrosha|gopadhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhazrosha|gokipadhazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:padhazmusha|padhazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhaznkmusha|gopadhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhazmusha|gokipadhazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:padhazsherasha|padhazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopadhaznksherasha|gopadhaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipadhazsherasha|gokipadhazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:padhazngasha|padhazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopadhaznkngasha|gopadhaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipadhazngasha|gokipadhazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:padhazyasha|padhazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopadhaznkyasha|gopadhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipadhazyasha|gokipadhazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:padhazyamasha|padhazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopadhaznkyamasha|gopadhaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipadhazyamasha|gokipadhazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhazn眉sh毛sha|padhazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhaznkn眉sh毛sha|gopadhaznkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhazn眉sh毛sha|gokipadhazn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhazn眉rosha|padhazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhaznkn眉rosha|gopadhaznkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhazn眉rosha|gokipadhazn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhazn眉musha|padhazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhaznkn眉musha|gopadhaznkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhazn眉musha|gokipadhazn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhazsh毛n眉sha|padhazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhaznksh毛n眉sha|gopadhaznksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhazsh毛n眉sha|gokipadhazsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhazsh毛rosha|padhazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhaznksh毛rosha|gopadhaznksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhazsh毛rosha|gokipadhazsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhazsh毛musha|padhazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhaznksh毛musha|gopadhaznksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhazsh毛musha|gokipadhazsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhazron眉sha|padhazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhaznkron眉sha|gopadhaznkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhazron眉sha|gokipadhazron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhazrosh毛sha|padhazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhaznkrosh毛sha|gopadhaznkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhazrosh毛sha|gokipadhazrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhazromusha|padhazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhaznkromusha|gopadhaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhazromusha|gokipadhazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhazmun眉sha|padhazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhaznkmun眉sha|gopadhaznkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhazmun眉sha|gokipadhazmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhazmush毛sha|padhazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhaznkmush毛sha|gopadhaznkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhazmush毛sha|gokipadhazmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhazmurosha|padhazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhaznkmurosha|gopadhaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhazmurosha|gokipadhazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:padhaz|padhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙dh忙z|p忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopadhaz|hopadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙dh忙z|hop忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopadhaz|hohopadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙dh忙z|hohop忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉padhaz|n眉padhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙dh忙z|n眉p忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉padhaz|n眉n眉padhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙dh忙z|n眉n眉p忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂padhaz|n茂padhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙dh忙z|n茂p忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂padhaz|n茂n茂padhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙dh忙z|n茂n茂p忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupadhaz|lupadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙dh忙z|lup忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupadhaz|lulupadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙dh忙z|lulup忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipadhaz|lipadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙dh忙z|lip忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipadhaz|lilipadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙dh忙z|lilip忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopadhaz|kopadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙dh忙z|kop忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopadhaz|kokopadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙dh忙z|kokop忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepadhaz|kepadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙dh忙z|kep忙dh忙z]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepadhaz|kekepadhaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙dh忙z|kekep忙dh忙z]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
